testcase.name: test_statistics_summary_endpoint_accessible
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_final_verification.py:48: in test_statistics_summary_endpoint_accessible assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Inloggning krävs"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
